justification_paragraph: I was injured during an intramural soccer game and required an urgent care visit. My insurance covered only a portion of the bill. This unexpected expense has put a significant strain on my monthly budget and I am unable to cover it without assistance. I am currently maintaining a 3.6 GPA and working part-time, but this expense exceeds what I can manage this month.
intended_use_description: Unexpected urgent care visit and prescription costs following a sports injury. Insurance did not cover the full amount.
